description: Per-intent fixture set for location-intent regressions. Standard: 20 fixtures per intent (user-set rule 2026-07-11). Sourced via `profiling/build_intent_all.py select --intent=location --limit=20`. Each fixture carries a `src` field for audit (which intent_all row it came from). When re-running `select`, the order can shift — `src` is the immutable identity. Edit `intent_corrections.json` to override intent misclassifications.
